title: Craftable sponge and ominous key
description: This datapack will allow you to craft a sponge and ominous key of trials.
body:
**With this datapack you will be able to create a sponge and also an ominous key of trials.**
I think many had a problem with finding a sponge and ominous key, this datapack solves this 
problem by adding balanced crafting.
To craft the ominous key you will need: 2 iron ingots, 2 copper ingots, a diamond, a default trial key and 2 deep slates.
To craft a sponge you will need: a bucket, 4 yellow wool and 4 feathers.
Don't forget to write the command /reload in the chat after installation
Enjoy playing with the datapack :)

_Ps: forgive me for my English._
